languages.text: "Этому человеку осталось недолго — дай ему пройти остаток пути на своих ногах. Он вряд ли переживет операцию по удалению аугментации". {n}Вивисектор кидает на пациента короткий сочувствующий взгляд.{/n}

"This man does not have long to live — let him walk the rest of the way on his own two feet. He is unlikely to survive the augment removal procedure." {n}The Vivisector casts a sympathetic glance at the patient.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Этому человеку осталось недолго — дай ему пройти остаток пути на своих ногах. Он вряд ли переживет операцию по удалению аугментации". {n}Вивисектор кидает на пациента короткий сочувствующий взгляд.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "This man does not have long to live — let him walk the rest of the way on his own two feet. He is unlikely to survive the augment removal procedure." {n}The Vivisector casts a sympathetic glance at the patient.{/n}

"This man does not have long to live — let him walk the rest of the way on his own two feet. He is unlikely to survive the augment removal procedure." {n}The Vivisector casts a sympathetic glance at the patient.{/n}

"This man does not have long to live — let him walk the rest of the way on his own two feet. He is unlikely to survive the augment removal procedure." {n}The Vivisector casts a sympathetic glance at the patient.{/n}

languages.text: 「この男は余命は短い。残りの道は自分で歩かせよう。増幅器の除去手術は生き残る可能性は低い」{n}解剖師は患者に同情の眼差しを向ける{/n}
languages.original_text: "This man does not have long to live — let him walk the rest of the way on his own two feet. He is unlikely to survive the augment removal procedure." {n}The Vivisector casts a sympathetic glance at the patient.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「この男は余命は短い。残りの道は自分で歩かせよう。増幅器の除去手術は生き残る可能性は低い」{n}解剖師は患者に同情の眼差しを向ける{/n}

languages.text: "Bu adamın yaşayacak fazla zamanı kalmamış. Bırakalım da yolun kalanını kendi ayakları üzerinde yürüsün. Ogment sökme işleminden sağ çıkması pek olası değil." {n}Dirikesimci, hastaya sempatik bir bakış atıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "This man does not have long to live — let him walk the rest of the way on his own two feet. He is unlikely to survive the augment removal procedure." {n}The Vivisector casts a sympathetic glance at the patient.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Bu adamın yaşayacak fazla zamanı kalmamış. Bırakalım da yolun kalanını kendi ayakları üzerinde yürüsün. Ogment sökme işleminden sağ çıkması pek olası değil." {n}Dirikesimci, hastaya sempatik bir bakış atıyor.{/n}

languages.text: «Al hombre no le queda mucho; deje que recorra el camino que le queda por su propio pie. No es probable que sobreviva al procedimiento de retirada del aumento». {n}El vivisector dedica una mirada de empatía al paciente.{/n}
languages.original_text: "This man does not have long to live — let him walk the rest of the way on his own two feet. He is unlikely to survive the augment removal procedure." {n}The Vivisector casts a sympathetic glance at the patient.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Al hombre no le queda mucho; deje que recorra el camino que le queda por su propio pie. No es probable que sobreviva al procedimiento de retirada del aumento». {n}El vivisector dedica una mirada de empatía al paciente.{/n}

languages.text: “这个人活不了多久了，让他用自己的双腿走完余生吧。他很可能挺不过植入物移除手术。”{n}解剖者向病人投去同情的一瞥。{/n}
languages.original_text: "This man does not have long to live — let him walk the rest of the way on his own two feet. He is unlikely to survive the augment removal procedure." {n}The Vivisector casts a sympathetic glance at the patient.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “这个人活不了多久了，让他用自己的双腿走完余生吧。他很可能挺不过植入物移除手术。”{n}解剖者向病人投去同情的一瞥。{/n}

languages.text: « Cet homme n'en a plus pour très longtemps ; laissez-le donc terminer son parcours sur ses deux jambes. De plus, il est peu probable qu'il survive à l'opération d'extraction des augmentations, » {n}raisonne le vivisecteur en lançant un regard compatissant au patient.{/n}
languages.original_text: "This man does not have long to live — let him walk the rest of the way on his own two feet. He is unlikely to survive the augment removal procedure." {n}The Vivisector casts a sympathetic glance at the patient.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Cet homme n'en a plus pour très longtemps ; laissez-le donc terminer son parcours sur ses deux jambes. De plus, il est peu probable qu'il survive à l'opération d'extraction des augmentations, » {n}raisonne le vivisecteur en lançant un regard compatissant au patient.{/n}

languages.text: "Dieser Mann hat nicht mehr lange zu leben – lasst ihn den Rest des Weges auf seinen eigenen zwei Beinen gehen. Er würde die Prozedur der Augmentationsentfernung wahrscheinlich nicht überleben." {n}Der Vivisektor wirft einen mitfühlenden Blick auf den Patienten.{/n}
languages.original_text: "This man does not have long to live — let him walk the rest of the way on his own two feet. He is unlikely to survive the augment removal procedure." {n}The Vivisector casts a sympathetic glance at the patient.{/n}
